name: daddy_fell_into_sun
description: Daddy Fell Into The Sun, short (97 words)

segments.text: Daddy fell into the sun
'Cause he's not with anyone
But she came falling, to screaming skies
The answer's no, it's just too high
Laputa was all we knew
And how we got there, how we flew
Where heaven's doors were miles away
'Cause you start to the ground, you have to stay
And the robots die in our flight
And the robots die down in the ground
Laputa was all we knew
And how we got there, how we flew
Where heaven's doors were miles away
'Cause you start to the ground, you have to stay
